issues.description: Missing entire first effect: '[Your Turn] Give all of your opponent's Characters −5 cost.' DSL only contains OnPlay effect, lacks the persistent duration effect.
Action should be 'maxCount':1 to represent 'up to 1', but more critically the first effect is completely missing.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] Give all of your opponent's Characters −5 cost. [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 0.
